name: Eddy
notes: DRAFT (background approximated: only acolyte/criminal/sage/soldier exist in SRD 5.2) — set real level/scores/spells. Aasimar in-fiction (white-eyed, spectral wings; SRD 5.2 has no Aasimar species — Human as the mechanical stand-in). Secretly Lathander’s avatar body + Edrelon’s mind + Silus’s soul (see notes/pc-eddy).
